wiki.controversies:
== Controversy ==
In July 2025, their former stylist, Lee Trigg revealed that Flo owed her over in unpaid fees and expenses for styling work. The dispute became public after fans discussed Flo's fashion online, leading Trigg to claim she had been trying to resolve the matter privately for a year, with lawyers involved, but only received online shade from Flo member Jorja Douglas.
wiki.extract:
Flo (commonly stylised in all uppercase) are a British girl group formed and signed with Island Records. The London-based group is composed of three members: Jorja Douglas, Stella Quaresma, and Renée Downer. The trio gained prominence for their debut song "Cardboard Box" (2022) after achieving viral popularity throughout social media, and received a silver certification by the British Phonographic Industry (BPI).
